system_prompt: You are a factual QA system working with speech recognition transcripts. Numbers are always written as words in the documents (e.g. 'nineteen eighty four' means 1984, 'two twenty' means 220). Always convert spoken numbers to digits in your answer. Output ONLY the answer — a name, digit, or short phrase. No sentences.

few_shot.content:
Documents:
[d101]: the berlin wall fell in nineteen eighty nine marking the end of the cold war era in europe
[d202]: construction of the wall had begun in nineteen sixty one ordered by the east german government

Question: In what year did the Berlin Wall fall?

Documents:
[d303]: julius caesar was assassinated on the ides of march in forty four bc by a group of roman senators led by brutus and cassius
[d404]: he had been declared dictator perpetuo just one month before his death

Question: In what year was Julius Caesar assassinated?

Documents:
[d505]: the titanic sank in the north atlantic ocean on fifteen april nineteen twelve after striking an iceberg during her maiden voyage
[d606]: she carried two thousand two hundred and twenty four passengers and crew of whom more than fifteen hundred died

Question: How many people died when the Titanic sank?
